reviews.comment:
Me cargaron NAFTA con agua, llené el tanque y a la cuadra se me quedó, la llevé al mecánico y le sacamos NAFTA con agua. Encima pedí premium, un besito muchachos, se fueron al chorizo

(Translated by Google)
They filled my tank with water mixed with gas, and it broke down a block later. I took it to the mechanic, and we drained the water. And on top of that, I asked for premium! A kiss for you guys, you really screwed up.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/16851497882005814309/reviews/ChdDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSURjcW9MeDdRRRAB
